jonny-mobile.task: context-keeper-remote: fix audit findings (README tool table drift, insertEntry retry bound)
jonny-mobile.note: Done. context-keeper-remote audit fixes on branch fix/audit-readme-and-retry, pushed to origin, PR #3 opened (NOT merged, per instructions): https://github.com/jarmstrong158/context-keeper-remote/pull/3 . Finding 1 (README tool-table drift): added config/record_entry/upsert_entries, marked deprecated aliases, fixed get_project_summary + query_entries limit + lazy-migration Layout drift. Finding 2 (insertEntry retry): bumped bound to 5 with backoff, id re-derived each attempt. npm test 44/44, typecheck clean. No secrets touched. Next action: review + merge PR #3.

jonny-desktop.task: Fix the consumable-use guaranteed-reject leak: policy action_type==8 fires targeted consumables (Trance/Death/Strength/Empress...) with no targets -> API rejects -> they clog the 2 consumable slots forever (Trance 30x, Death 22x), blocking planets and stalling leveling (the one lever that predicts depth). Route through plan_consumable_use for targets; no-op instead of firing a guaranteed reject.
